decks.notes: This deck aims to aggressively disrupt opponents' game plans through a combination of strong creatures and disruptive spells. By leveraging cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury, it pressures opponents early while using cards like Consign to Memory and Prismatic Ending to control the board. The deck's key strategy is to overwhelm opponents with early aggression while using disruptive spells to maintain control of the battlefield and prevent opponents from stabilizing. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler to further disrupt opponents' game plans and gain incremental advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Power Plant, and Mine) to quickly generate large amounts of colorless mana and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Devourer of Destiny. The deck also includes cards like Ugin, Karn, and All Is Dust to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Expedition Map helps to tutor for the UrzaTron lands, ensuring consistency in assembling the key lands for maximum mana production. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with big threats and powerful control elements.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressively costed creatures and disruptive spells to put pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. By combining efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with cards like Solitude and Quantum Riddler to control the board, the deck aims to quickly close out games. Teferi, Time Raveler and Ephemerate provide additional disruption and tempo advantage, while Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Consign to Memory offer powerful finishers. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan and allow for consistent casting of its spells.

The deck focuses on assembling a strong combo utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom and Tameshi, Reality Architect to generate powerful effects without relying on traditional lands. The strategy combines disruptive elements like Counterspell and Suppression Ray with cards like Hydroelectric Specimen and Goblin Charbelcher to control the board and outmaneuver opponents. The deck also includes card draw and tutoring capabilities with tools like Preordain and Whir of Invention to ensure consistency in executing the combo. Overall, the deck emphasizes a unique playstyle that aims to overwhelm opponents in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of creatures and enchantments to generate a fast and aggressive playstyle. By maximizing the use of cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos, Witch Enchanter, and Starfield Shepherd, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of powerful creatures and enchantment-based spells. The inclusion of cards like Solitude and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provides additional removal and protection against threats, while cards like Ephemerate and Guide of Souls help to maintain card advantage and efficiency in combat. The overall strategy revolves around building a strong board presence and taking control of the game early on.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards that enable the player to quickly fill their graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Archon of Cruelty, and then bring them back into play with cards like Unearth and Persist. By combining reanimation effects with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while putting pressure on them with powerful creatures. Ultimately, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with early threats and card advantage, leading to a swift victory through a combo-driven reanimation strategy.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly amass damage through low-cost spells and efficient creatures. By utilizing cards like Cori-Steel Cutter, Monastery Swiftspear, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game. Additionally, the deck includes instant damage spells like Lightning Bolt, Lava Dart, and Mutagenic Growth to deal direct damage to the opponent or remove threats from the board. The deck also includes card draw and selection with cards like Preordain, Expressive Iteration, and Mishra's Bauble to maintain momentum and find key cards.

Utilizing the UrzaTron lands and artifacts for ramp and control, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Karn, the Great Creator, while also presenting powerful threats like Ugin, the Spirit Dragon and Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger. The deck also includes Eldrazi creatures for additional pressure and board control, as well as disruptive spells like Dismember and Chalice of the Void. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of big threats and disruption, while maintaining control of the game.

This deck focuses on filling the graveyard with creatures using cards like Faithless Looting and Stitcher's Supplier, then bringing them back with reanimation spells like Persist and Archon of Cruelty. The goal is to quickly assemble a powerful board presence of creatures like Bloodghast and Emperor of Bones, overwhelming the opponent with threats. The deck also includes cards like Flare of Malice and Lightning Bolt for additional removal and damage. The key strategy is to efficiently reanimate creatures and control the board to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on using Eldrazi creatures and ramp spells to quickly deploy threats onto the battlefield while controlling the opponent's board with various removal spells. The key strategy is to accelerate mana production with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple to play big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms ahead of schedule. The deck also includes cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain control of the battlefield.

This deck focuses on aggressively disrupting your opponent's strategy while also putting pressure on them with aggressive creatures. The deck utilizes a mix of control spells like Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge to disrupt your opponent's plays, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to close out the game quickly. The inclusion of cards like Quantum Riddler and Teferi, Time Raveler also provide utility and flexibility in dealing with a variety of threats. This deck aims to keep your opponent on the back foot while efficiently closing out the game.

The deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with low-cost artifacts and mana rocks to power out threats and disrupt opponents with cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt. It utilizes the synergy between artifacts and spells like Urza's Saga to create a fast and aggressive strategy that aims to overwhelm opponents before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck also has some flexibility with cards like Metallic Rebuke and Salvage Titan to adapt to different matchups and strategies.

The focus of this deck is on playing aggressively and quickly, using low-cost spells and creatures to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It includes cards that can buff creatures, remove opponents' threats, and provide card advantage. The deck aims to control the board while also putting pressure on the opponent. The deck is built around utilizing aggressive red and blue creatures along with efficient burn spells to quickly close out the game. This archetype aims to win the game quickly and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful Eldrazi creatures and disrupt their game plan with Thought-Knot Seer and Kozilek's Command. The deck utilizes Eldrazi Temple and Cavern of Souls to ramp into its bigger threats quickly, while also including disruptive elements like Dismember and Sire of Seven Deaths. The deck aims to apply pressure early and close out the game with massive threats like It That Heralds the End, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize and come back.

This deck focuses on using Simic Birthing Ritual to quickly ramp up mana and cast powerful creatures and spells. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Abhorrent Oculus and Ice-Fang Coatl, backed up by disruptive spells like Flare of Denial and Sink into Stupor. The deck also includes versatile cards like Coiling Oracle and Shardless Agent to maintain card advantage and adapt to different situations. The key strategy is to establish board control and apply pressure early in the game to secure a fast victory.

The main concept of this Dimir Control deck is to slowly control the board and disrupt the opponent's plans through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. The deck focuses on controlling the game with cards like Counterspell, Fatal Push, and Subtlety, while also utilizing Cling to Dust for graveyard interaction and Consult the Star Charts for card selection. The deck aims to keep the opponent off balance with a mix of disruption and threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian, while maintaining card advantage through Undercity Sewers and Sheoldred's Edict.
